hero.name: Wivin
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Future Tech Lead, passionate about cloud and modern architectures.
hero.description: Full-stack developer with a strong taste for cloud, architecture and well-crafted products. I build robust web applications and polished experiences, from idea to deployment.

sections.contact_subtitle: Got a project in mind, a technical question, or an opportunity to discuss? I'm all ears.

about.title: Who I am
about.p1: Full-stack developer with 3 years of experience, I sharpened my craft at Magentizy, an e-commerce agency specialized in Magento, where I shipped robust platforms for demanding clients.
about.p2: I am currently finishing a Master's degree at ESGI Lyon, alongside a busy professional activity. This double life taught me to balance business constraints, technical debt and continuous learning.
about.p3: What drives me: software architecture, DevOps and mentoring. I build systems meant to last, and I love sharing what I learn with the teams around me.

projects.title: What I build
projects.subtitle: A selection of pro, personal and lab work.

aws.description: Ramping up on AWS services and cloud fundamentals, working toward the official certification.

magentizy.description: Building Magento 2 e-commerce platforms and internal tools, from design to deployment, for demanding clients.

esgi.description: Advanced training in web architecture, DevOps and software engineering, alongside a busy professional activity.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Got a project in mind, a technical question, or an opportunity to discuss? I'm all ears.
